productDisplayName: Puma Women Trinity White Casual Shoe
description: puma, a brand of German origin, is known for its high-end athletic footwear with simplistic designs. This pair of Trinity WN shoes from puma is a comfortable and stylish footwear choice. A pair of sneaker style shoes that does not conform, these shoes reflect the contemporary urge for individualism. Pair it with fitted denims and a tee. Upper Fabric upper with check patterned overlays for dry comfort Formstripe for shoe structure Lacing system covering only the forefoot and an outer tongue Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole TPU outsole with waffle patterned grooves for grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
